What We Do

Our Services

From top to bottom, we restore your home's curb appeal using the right tools, the right chemistry, and years of hands-on experience.

01
Soft Wash House Cleaning

Low-pressure cleaning with professional-grade solutions that safely eliminate mold, mildew, algae, and grime — without damaging your siding.

Vinyl, Brick & Stucco
Roof Washing
Safe for Paint & Wood
Kills Mold at the Root
02
Pressure Washing

High-powered deep cleaning for driveways, walkways, patios, pool decks, and concrete surfaces that take heavy traffic and tough stains.

Driveways & Concrete
Patios & Pool Decks
Fences & Wood Surfaces
03
Gutter Cleaning & Brightening

We clear debris, eliminate black oxidation streaks, and keep your gutters flowing freely. Gutter guard installation also available.

Full Debris Removal
Black Streak Elimination
Flow & Drainage Check
Gutter Guard Installation
05
Deck & Wood Cleaning

We restore weathered, grey decks back to life using the right pressure and chemistry — stripping years of grime, mold, and UV damage without damaging the wood.

Wood Deck Restoration
Fence Cleaning
Safe Wood-Specific Chemistry
06
Permanent LED Lighting

We install permanent, app-controlled LED lighting systems on your home — perfect for every season, holiday, and occasion. No more ladder, no more hassle.

Permanent House Installation
Christmas & Holiday Lighting
App-Controlled Color & Timing
Custom Design Included

Common Questions

FAQ

How much does soft washing cost in Eden, NC?

Most soft wash jobs range from $150–$400 depending on the size of your home and what services you need. We offer free estimates — just call or text (336) 589-5531 and we'll give you a fair, transparent price with no surprises.

What's the difference between soft washing and pressure washing?

Soft washing uses low pressure with professional-grade cleaning solutions to safely remove mold, mildew, and algae from siding, roofs, and painted surfaces. Pressure washing uses high pressure and is best for hard surfaces like concrete driveways and patios. We use the right method for each surface.

Is soft washing safe for my plants and landscaping?

Yes. We take precautions to protect your landscaping before we start — wetting plants down, covering sensitive areas, and rinsing thoroughly after the job. Our solutions are diluted properly and we've done hundreds of jobs without plant damage.

How often should I have my gutters cleaned?

For most homes in the Eden, NC area, we recommend at least twice a year — once in late spring and once in late fall after the leaves drop. If you have a lot of trees nearby, you may need it more frequently.

Do you offer free estimates?

Yes — always free, always no obligation. Call or text us at (336) 589-5531 and we'll get you a quote fast. Most estimates can be done same day.

Are you licensed and insured?

Yes. New Home Glow LLC is fully insured. You're covered on every job we do.

What areas do you serve?

We're based in Eden, NC and serve Reidsville, Stoneville, Mayodan, Madison, Wentworth, Martinsville VA, Danville VA, and surrounding communities. Not sure if we cover your area? Give us a call.
